ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_clean" TEXT /* Cleaned name of the song */,
  "song_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "first_release" INTEGER /* Indicator if this is the first release of the song */,
  "year_release" INTEGER /* Indicator if the release year is known */,
  "isrc_code" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) for the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_clean" TEXT /* Cleaned name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "artist_image" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_artist" (
  "song_artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song-artist relationship */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the song (e.g., lead vocalist, producer) */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., featured artist, guest artist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artist_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artist_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main artist of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of album (e.g., studio, live, compilation) */,
  "album_cover_art" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_album" (
  "song_album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song-album relationship */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song on the album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number of the song on the album (for multi-disc albums) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_album_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_album_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song played */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the song was played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the song */,
  "play_platform" TEXT /* Platform used to play the song (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "play_device" TEXT /* Device used to play the song (e.g., phone, tablet, computer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, content manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred genres */,
  "favorite_artists" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of favorite artists */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings for the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the label */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the label */,
  "label_website" TEXT /* Website of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concerts" (
  "concert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concert */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist performing */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the concert */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the concert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the concert */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, festival) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concerts_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concert_songs" (
  "concert_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concert-song relationship */,
  "concert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concert */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song performed */,
  "performance_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the song was performed */,
  "setlist_position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the setlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concert_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concert_songs_concert_id FOREIGN KEY ("concert_id") REFERENCES concerts ("concert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concert_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of the chart (e.g., Top 100, Hot 100) */,
  "ranking_method" TEXT /* Method used to rank the chart (e.g., sales, streaming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_positions" (
  "chart_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart position */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the chart */,
  "weeks_on_chart" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the song has been on the chart */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Peak position reached by the song on the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_positions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_positions_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (artist or song) */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of the recipient (artist or song) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being reviewed (song or album) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item being reviewed (song or album) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release (e.g., single, album, EP) */,
  "release_format" TEXT /* Format of the release (e.g., digital, physical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., remix, live, acoustic) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_versions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_socials" (
  "artist_social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist social profile */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "social_platform" TEXT /* Name of the social platform (e.g., Instagram, Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "social_profile" TEXT /* URL of the artist's social profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_socials_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_news_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
